violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Home canned salsa and honey in the dry storage room.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Refrigeration unit in the walk in cooler drains into a bucket.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tile missing above where you walk back into the dry storage area exposing the attic.
Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Home canned foods in the refrigerator and in dry storage.
